standard_runs.rule: paid_amount and confirmed student count match pricing policy
slot booking exists only after payment gate
materials generated only for confirmed/locked slot
courier batch exists for released material where dispatch is required
OMR import exists only after received/count-reconciled courier batch
results generated only from approved OMR candidate scores
certificates issued only for published eligible results
required critical event notifications queued/delivered or failed with reason
school participation has consistent flow from registration to certificate where applicable
